title: Misato is the Nanny
wikitext:
[]: Misato is the Nanny             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Mon Feb 08, 2010 8:38 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W11vki7uXSI&feature=channel This one was just so funny it deserves its own thread. In all honesty I could see Misato as the Nanny.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Mon Feb 08, 2010 8:50 pm *laughs like Fran Drescher*

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Mon Feb 08, 2010 9:04 pm The most scary part of this is its almost complete accuracy.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Mon Feb 08, 2010 10:15 pm This is just another proof of how awesome Misato is.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Mon Feb 08, 2010 10:25 pm 0:31 0-0 My eyes... there disturbed.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Tue Feb 09, 2010 7:22 am LMFAOOOOOOOOOOOOO you guys HAVE to watch this is other one by the same guy... Rei is the girl who just can't say no! [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MAq1VTdxG_o&feature=channel[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by AVman9 » Tue Feb 09, 2010 8:54 am This is grand.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 09, 2010 2:49 pm He is a member of these forums and also does an Eva parody.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Feb 10, 2010 3:45 pm Misato-san FTW!

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Feb 10, 2010 9:57 pm Xard wrote: Misato-san FTW!

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Wed Feb 10, 2010 10:15 pm schismatics wrote: You Finnish people had The Nanny??

[]:             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Thu Feb 11, 2010 12:03 am I think I know what the next spinoff manga will be about. ran1 wrote: Though they might just watch it in English, considering everyone in Europe is at least tri-lingual and one of those languages is most likely English.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Feb 11, 2010 5:56 am Sun Stealer wrote: I think I know what the next spinoff manga will be about.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Fri Feb 12, 2010 1:29 am A spinoff manga featuring Misato as the nanny? I'd read it.

[]: Re: Misato is the Nanny             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 12, 2010 1:56 am Grimmjow wrote: This one was just so funny it deserves its own thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Feb 12, 2010 9:52 am ran1 wrote: schismatics wrote: You Finnish people had The Nanny??

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Feb 12, 2010 10:43 am Xard wrote: we always lulz at dubfags bitching about BAWWW I CAN'T READ AND WATCH THE FILM AT THE SAME TIME

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Fri Feb 12, 2010 11:50 am Well... ...ah, forget it.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Fri Feb 12, 2010 12:20 pm Italy has The Nanny too - but they made her Italian-American. ran1 wrote: everyone in Europe is at least tri-lingual

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Feb 12, 2010 2:41 pm Hey, if Missouri and Indiana spoke different languages than Illinois I'm sure I'd be motivated to learn more languages too. As is... not so much.

[]: Misato is the Nanny             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Mon Feb 08, 2010 8:38 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W11vki7uXSI&feature=channel This one was just so funny it deserves its own thread. In all honesty I could see Misato as the Nanny.
